burst.ParentFunc: alexnet_layer1(ap_fixed<16, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0>*, ap_fixed<16, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0>*, ap_fixed<16, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0> const*, ap_fixed<16, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0> const*)

burst.msg_body: Could not widen since type i16 size is greater than or equal to the max_widen_bitwidth threshold of 0
burst.ParentFunc: alexnet_layer1(ap_fixed<16, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0>*, ap_fixed<16, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0>*, ap_fixed<16, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0> const*, ap_fixed<16, 8, (ap_q_mode)5, (ap_o_mode)3, 0> const*)

burst.msg_body: Multiple burst reads of length 34848 and bit width 16 in loop 'VITIS_LOOP_36_1' has been inferred on bundle 'gmem2'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

Multiple burst reads of length 96 and bit width 16 in loop 'VITIS_LOOP_36_1' has been inferred on bundle 'gmem3'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

Multiple burst reads of length 11 and bit width 16 has been inferred on bundle 'gmem0'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.
